item.title: Automating IPAM in Cloud: Ansible + Netbox
item.description: A few months back, I was asked to put together a short demonstration on how I would automate IP Address Management (IPAM) in Microsoft Azure as new environments are spun up. If you are hybrid multi-cloud, it probably means you are sharing the same RFC1918 space across clouds and traditional networking. If this is the case, it means you probably want to keep track of allocation across VNets, Subnets, and VMs.
